creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to fk from comment #0)
> Note that I'm intentionally not using the still-optional LICENSE "framework"
> in my ports until it's properly maintained, documented and the legal aspects
> are clear. Please do not add LICENSE* goo to this port without discussing it
> with me first. Thanks.


I would say that if the maintainer feels this way, there shouldn't be any LICENSE installed at all.  

I agree with him on all these points, but the solution is not roll-your-own.  There's no requirement to participate, so don't.  Omitting it is not incorrect.  Putting it in DOCSDIR is.

Adam, it's explained in Mk/bsd.license.mk
